hero.title: Modesty, Elevated.
hero.description: Designing resourceful modest attire. Ethically crafted, inherently elegant, and unapologetically premium.

mission.label: The Ethos
mission.title: Fashion Should Not Cost a Childhood.
mission.description: The fast fashion industry relies heavily on unethical labor practices. We exist to dismantle this narrative. Every garment is produced ethically, supporting artisans and providing living wages.

points.title: Verified Supply Chain
points.description: No child labor. We audit every factory and workshop involved in our production to ensure absolute transparency and dignity.

points.title: Artisan Empowerment
points.description: We pay above living wages, preserving traditional craftsmanship that fast fashion destroys.

points.title: Built to Last
points.description: Instead of wearing something three times before it tears, our modest garments are generational. Crafted from premium, durable textiles.
